title: Spicy Prawn Paella
description: A fusion of Thai flavors with the classic Spanish dish. Sweet and spicy prawns in a savory paella.

ingredients.name: Mexican
ingredients.notes: Canned diced tomatoes with green chilies

instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add prawns and cook until pink, about 2 minutes per side.
4. Add Mexican tomatoes and cook until heated through.
5. Stir in sweet chili sauce and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add paella rice and stir to coat with oil and sauce.
7. Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
8. Add cooked prawns back to the pan and simmer, covered, for 15-20 minutes.
9. Fluff rice with a fork and serve hot.
10. Garnish with fresh cilantro, if desired.
